company_name: H2O So Clean Pool & Spa Services
tagline: Exceptional Pool Service at Fair Prices

hero.headline: San Diego's Most Trusted Pool Care Pro
hero.subheadline: Get a free $220-value consultation that includes a full service, 13-factor water chemistry test, and 45-point equipment check. Owner Daniel Schreiber personally oversees every job so your pool stays perfect.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool, Spa & Fountain<br class="hidden md:block"> Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to complex repairs and full installations, H2O So Clean handles it all. Licensed, certified, and ready to keep your water perfect.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly maintenance including chemical balancing, skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and a 13-factor water chemistry test to keep your pool crystal clear year-round.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, heaters, filters, automation systems, and plumbing leaks. Parts on-truck means most repairs are completed same-visit.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of heaters, pumps, filters, automation systems, and LED lighting upgrades for new and existing pools throughout San Diego County.

cards.title: Spa Service & Repair
cards.description: Complete spa and hot tub maintenance, repair, and installation. Water chemistry, jet repair, heater service, and equipment upgrades handled by a certified operator.

cards.title: Fountain Service
cards.description: Specialized care for decorative fountains and water features including flow optimization, chemistry management, and equipment repair to keep them running beautifully.

cards.title: 45-Point Equipment Check
cards.description: Thorough system efficiency evaluation that identifies potential issues before they become costly repairs. Included free with every new client consultation.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. Daniel will schedule your complimentary $220-value consultation, including a full service, 13-factor water test, and 45-point equipment check.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Plan
steps.description: After inspecting your pool, Daniel builds a maintenance or repair plan tailored to your equipment, water conditions, and budget. Honest pricing, no pressure.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling and swim-ready while Daniel handles everything. With a perfect 5-star track record, you can trust that your pool is in the best hands in San Diego.

about.label: Why San Diego Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated, CPO-Certified, and Personally Committed
about.description: Founded by Daniel Schreiber in 2018, H2O So Clean has grown through word-of-mouth and a relentless commitment to doing things right. As a Certified Pool Operator and licensed California contractor, Daniel personally oversees every service call. That hands-on approach has earned a perfect 5.0-star Google rating and a loyal following across San Diego County.

features.title: Licensed CA Contractor #1067459
features.description: Fully licensed and insured with the State of California. Your property and investment are always protected.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no fine print.

features.title: Parts On-Truck, Faster Fixes
features.description: Daniel carries common parts and equipment on every call, so most repairs are completed same-visit without scheduling a return trip.

pricing.headline: Fair Prices. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Transparent, competitive pricing praised consistently by our customers. No contracts, no hidden fees, cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call Daniel directly. He'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. With a perfect 5-star rating across 33 reviews, we've built our reputation on doing exactly that. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's how we've grown our business.

faqs.question: What's included in the free $220 consultation?
faqs.answer: You get a full pool service, a 13-factor water chemistry test, a 45-point equipment inspection, and a system efficiency evaluation. Daniel reviews everything with you on-site and provides honest recommendations — no pressure, no obligation.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and Daniel takes care of everything. You'll always know what was done and can reach Daniel directly with any questions.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within a few days. For urgent repairs, Daniel often has parts on his truck for same-day fixes. Call us and we'll work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: Never. We earn your business every visit. No contracts, no cancellation penalties, no commitments. Over 33 five-star reviews prove clients stay because they want to, not because they have to.

faqs.question: What areas of San Diego do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of San Diego County, including Carmel Valley, La Jolla, Del Mar, Rancho Santa Fe, and surrounding communities. If you're in the county, we can take care of your pool.

testimonials.name: Jessie B.
testimonials.text: Daniel at H2O So Clean far exceeded our expectations. Where others talk about delays in supplies, he has equipment on his truck. Where others schedule weeks out, he was super responsive and was even available earlier than scheduled.

testimonials.name: Samuel M.
testimonials.text: Pool heater stopped working and filter was leaking. Called H2O which was the best thing I did. Daniel was so nice, friendly, and knowledgeable. Got a few other quotes but Daniel had the best prices and fastest service.

testimonials.name: Anthony D.
testimonials.text: Daniel was not only quick to respond but he spent the time to go over the situation in detail and walked me through getting it resolved knowing that he was not getting paid for his time.

contact.subtitle: Claim your free $220 consultation today. Daniel will personally inspect your pool, test your water, and give you an honest plan — no pressure, no obligation.
benefits: Free $220 consultation with every new client
